title: New Web UI Tools at Google I/O 2026

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Hey Ben, did you hear about the new web tools Google showed at I/O 2026?
dialogue.chinese: 嘿 Ben，你听说谷歌在 I/O 2026 上展示的新网页工具了吗？

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Yes, Chrome presented a whole set of them, all meant for better web interfaces today.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，Chrome 展示了一整套工具，都是为了让网页界面更好。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: One cool thing is CSS custom functions, like adding your own shortcuts to a recipe.
dialogue.chinese: 一个酷的功能是 CSS 自定义函数，就像在食谱里加入自己的小窍门。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: View transitions let pages slide like photos in a photo album when you change views.
dialogue.chinese: 视图切换让页面在切换视图时像相册里的照片一样滑动。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: There are also scroll‑driven animations that move things as you scroll down a page smoothly.
dialogue.chinese: 还有滚动驱动的动画，让你在页面下滑时东西平滑地移动。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Scroll‑triggered animations pop up when you reach a spot, like surprise on treasure map, sudden.
dialogue.chinese: 滚动触发的动画在你到达某个位置时弹出，就像宝藏图上的惊喜，突然出现。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: HTML inside Canvas lets you draw a picture and write text on it directly now.
dialogue.chinese: Canvas 内的 HTML 让你可以直接在画好的图上写文字。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: And text‑fit makes text shrink or grow so it always fits inside its box perfectly.
dialogue.chinese: text-fit 能让文字缩小或放大，使其始终恰好适应它的盒子。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: All these tools are meant to make interfaces clearer, smoother, and more flexible for users.
dialogue.chinese: 所有这些工具都是为了用户的界面更清晰、更流畅、更灵活。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Developers can try them now in Chrome, and they work with the latest web standards.
dialogue.chinese: 开发者现在可以在 Chrome 中试用它们，并且它们遵循最新的网页标准。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: I think designers will love the view transitions because they feel like a slide show.
dialogue.chinese: 我觉得设计师会喜欢视图切换，因为它们感觉像幻灯片一样。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Scroll‑driven animations could make games and stories move as you scroll down the page quickly.
dialogue.chinese: 滚动驱动的动画可以让游戏和故事在你快速下滑页面时动起来。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: HTML inside Canvas is great for adding labels or buttons on top of drawings directly.
dialogue.chinese: Canvas 内的 HTML 很适合在绘图上直接添加标签或按钮。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Text‑fit will help keep buttons readable even when the screen size changes a lot easily.
dialogue.chinese: text-fit 能帮助按钮在屏幕尺寸变化很大时仍然保持易读。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Overall, these updates should make websites feel more alive and easier to use for everyone.
dialogue.chinese: 总的来说，这些更新应该让网站更有活力，对每个人来说都更易用。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: I’m excited to try them and see how they improve the web for us today.
dialogue.chinese: 我很兴奋去尝试它们，看看它们今天如何改善我们的网络体验。

source_title: What's new in web UI at Google I/O 2026
